  protobuf-java 3.19.2:
    CVE-2022-3171 (DoS via crafted input, CVSS 7.5)
    CVE-2022-3509 (DoS via crafted input, CVSS 7.5)
    CVE-2022-3510 (DoS via crafted input, CVSS 7.5)
    CVE-2024-7254 (DoS via crafted input, CVSS 8.7)
    — all fixed in protobuf-java 3.25.x

  guava 30.1.1-android:
    CVE-2023-2976 (temp file world-readable, CVSS 7.1) — fixed in 32.0+

Changes in opendebt-payment-service/pom.xml:
  - grpc-netty-shaded: 1.44.1 → 1.68.1 (direct dep)
  - grpc-core, grpc-protobuf, grpc-stub pinned to 1.68.1 in dependencyManagement
  - protobuf-java: 3.19.2 → 3.25.5 in dependencyManagement
  - guava: added 33.4.0-jre in dependencyManagement

    (postgresql pulls 3.42.0, guava 33.4.0-jre pulls 3.43.0)

commit.message:
feat(TB-043): extract Keycloak/OAuth2 resource server as Spring Boot starter

Introduces dk.ufst:keycloak-oauth2-starter:1.0 — a Spring Boot
auto-configuration that replaces the duplicated SecurityConfig boilerplate
in all OpenDebt API services.

Deleted SecurityConfig from:
  - opendebt-debt-service
  - opendebt-case-service
  - opendebt-person-registry

MethodSecurityConfig retained/created in:
  - opendebt-creditor-service (@Profile !local & !dev & !demo, preserving
    the profile-guarded @EnableMethodSecurity from the original inner class)
  - opendebt-payment-service (no profile restriction, matching original)

Starter provides:
  - JWT resource server (CSRF disabled, stateless, actuator/swagger permitted)
  - Profile-based auth: !local&!dev&!demo → full JWT; local|dev|demo → permit all
  - @ConditionalOnMissingBean back-off for service-specific overrides
  - Spring Boot 3.x AutoConfiguration.imports registration
  - KeycloakStarterProperties for configurable permitted-paths

pom.xml changes: replaced spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server with
keycloak-oauth2-starter:1.0 in all 5 service pom.xml files (oauth2-resource-server
is brought transitively by the starter).

Not touched:
  - Portal SecurityConfigs (OAuth2 client pattern, different concern)
  - AuthContext (domain-coupled, stays in opendebt-common)
  - CaseAccessChecker, CreditorAccessChecker, DebtorAccessChecker
  - opendebt-integration-gateway (no SecurityConfig present)
  - Parent POM modules list (starter is standalone)

All 5 services compile successfully (mvn compile -q, exit 0).

Docs: architecture-overview.md updated for creditor-service component table;
ADR-0005 amended with TB-043 starter extraction note.

commit.message:
Fix missing zeros in H/TB/HR/K stat series for batters and pitchers

Counting stat extractors only produced rows for games where the event
occurred, silently dropping 0-hit or 0-K games from the chart series.

Fix: reindex against all game dates the player appeared and fill_value=0
for all zero-fill stats (H, HR, TB, SO, K, BB, SB). EV and RBI are
aggregations and handle their own NaN logic — not zero-filled.

Refactor SKManagedStream: replace parent/child chain with SKData snapshot (#3589)

Replace the fragile parent/child weak-reference ownership chain in
SKManagedStream with a lazy SKData snapshot approach for duplicate/fork.

OnDuplicate() now creates a native SkMemoryStream backed by a cached,
ref-counted SKData snapshot of the .NET stream. OnFork() duplicates and
seeks to the current position. The original stream remains fully readable
after duplication, multiple duplicates are allowed, and each duplicate is
an independent native stream with no managed interop overhead.

This is both simpler and faster than the old approach:
- No parent/child weak references or ownership transfer logic
- No VerifyOriginal() / InvalidOperationException on the original stream
- Snapshot is cached (one read, shared by all duplicates)
- Native SkMemoryStream duplicates expose getMemoryBase(), enabling
  zero-copy fast paths in Skia (e.g. CoreText font loading on macOS)

Tests updated to reflect new semantics:
- Removed SkipOnNonWindows() from 6 tests (no longer throws in native
  delegates, so all platforms can run these tests now)
- Added NonSeekableStreamDuplicateAndForkReturnNull test
- Renamed DotNetStreamIsClosedWhenSKManagedStreamIsDisposed to document
  that the .NET stream is closed when the parent is disposed (the
  snapshot keeps duplicates alive independently via native ref-counting)

Based on the original SKManagedStream refactoring from PR #3560.

  ModregningServiceTest (16), KorrektionspuljeServiceTest (14),
  RenteGodtgoerelseServiceTest (12)

Key invariants:
- renteGodtgoerelseNonTaxable ALWAYS true (GIL SS 8b)

- Idempotency via nemkontoReferenceId (AC-5)

fix: write class_names.txt and embed class_names in args for deploy_to_roboflow (#890)

The Roboflow upload pipeline requires either a class_names.txt file in
the upload directory or class_names in the checkpoint args namespace.
After switching to PyTorch Lightning training, class_names was no longer
embedded in the args namespace, causing RFDETRSeg (and any model) uploads
to fail with FileNotFoundError from the Roboflow client library.

Fixes: deploy_to_roboflow now writes class_names.txt and populates args.class_names before saving the checkpoint.

Adds regression tests covering:
- class_names.txt written with correct one-per-line content
- args.class_names set when absent (the regression scenario)
- existing args.class_names not overwritten
- temp directory cleaned up after successful deploy

* fix: try/finally cleanup + fix broken deploy tests
* fix: accept **kwargs in deploy_side_effect for forward-compat
* fix: write class_names.txt with explicit utf-8 and LF newlines
* test: cover args.class_names is None branch in deploy_to_roboflow
* test: update _make_mock_self default size to 'rfdetr-small'
* fix: widen version param type to int | str in deploy_to_roboflow

  the page containing a target turn before highlighting
- Exposed via ChatViewModel.MountTranscriptPageContainingTurn
- BringIntoView on the SelectableTextBlock after mounting + layout

- Clears search state on chat switch (OnDataContextChanged)
